education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

projects.name: Mobile-Based Commodity Search & Comparison System
projects.description: Developed a marketplace platform enabling real-time product search, filtering by category, brand, price, and condition, with side-by-side comparison of specifications to support informed online shopping decisions.

projects.name: Medicine Recommendation System
projects.description: Built a symptom-based medicine recommender using Flask and scikit-learn, achieving 90% prediction accuracy.

projects.name: RAG-Based CSV Analyzer
projects.description: Designed a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system for document analysis using N8N.

projects.name: SpendBuddy: Expense Tracking App
projects.description: Developed an expense management app with real-time tracking, category-wise analysis, and interactive dashboards using JavaScript and Firebase.
